patient_data.chief_complaint: Chronic cough for 3 weeks with blood-streaked sputum, night sweats, weight loss
symptoms: Unintentional weight loss of 8 kg in 2 months
patient_data.history: Immigration from high TB-burden country (India) 6 months ago. Lives in crowded housing with 8 people. No previous TB treatment. HIV status unknown.

lab_results.CXR: Right upper lobe cavitary lesion with surrounding infiltrate

should_detect: Classic TB presentation: chronic cough >2 weeks + hemoptysis + night sweats + weight loss
Cavitary lesion on CXR — highly suggestive of active pulmonary TB
Sputum AFB smear and culture MUST be obtained
GeneXpert MTB/RIF for rapid diagnosis and rifampicin resistance detection
HIV testing mandatory — TB-HIV coinfection management
Standard RIPE regimen: Rifampicin + Isoniazid + Pyrazinamide + Ethambutol
